Explore god's own country with us

25 tours booked in the last 24 hours.

Wegomap is a Kochi-based tour operator in Kerala, offering top-quality travel services at best prices. We partner with trusted hotels and travel services to ensure a safe and enjoyable holiday, backed by 24/7 customer support. Contact us for custom tour packages tailored to fit your needs and budget.

Kerala Travel Packages

Kerala, famously known as "God's Own Country," is a breathtaking destination that harmoniously blends lush greenery, rich cultural heritage, and serene landscapes.Whether you’re planning a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or a group trip, Wegomap, a trusted Kerala travel agency, offers a wide range of Kerala tour packages that cater to every type of traveler. From affordable Kerala budget packages to luxurious escapes, we provide personalized experiences that ensure your Kerala journey is nothing short of spectacular.

Kerala Honeymoon Packages

Kerala is one of the most sought-after honeymoon destinations in India, offering a unique mix of scenic landscapes, tranquil backwaters, and pristine beaches. Our Kerala honeymoon packages are designed to give newlyweds an unforgettable experience. Enjoy a romantic houseboat cruise in Alleppey, a cozy stay in the hill stations of Munnar, or a peaceful retreat in the backwaters of Kumarakom. With Wegomap’s expertise, we ensure that every moment of your honeymoon is special and tailored to your preferences.

Kerala Packages for Family

Kerala is also an ideal destination for families, offering a variety of experiences that cater to all age groups. From exploring the tea gardens of Munnar to wildlife safaris in Thekkady, our Kerala packages for family are designed to create lasting memories. We offer family-friendly accommodations, kid-friendly activities, and exciting excursions that will make your family vacation in Kerala both fun and relaxing. Whether it’s a beach holiday, a cultural tour, or a nature retreat, Wegomap ensures your family has a memorable time.

Kerala Group Packages

If you’re traveling with friends, colleagues, or a larger group, Kerala is the perfect destination to explore together. Our Kerala group packages offer customized itineraries that suit the needs of all types of groups. Whether it’s a corporate retreat, a school trip, or a group of friends looking to explore the beauty of Kerala, we provide the best experiences with a focus on comfort, fun, and adventure. From backwater cruises to hill station tours, our group packages are designed to create shared experiences that bring people closer.

Kerala Packages Under Rs. 10,000

Exploring this paradise on a budget is entirely possible without sacrificing the quality of your experience. Wegomap offers affordable Kerala packages under Rs. 10,000 that allow you to experience the best of Kerala without breaking the bank. Our Kerala budget packages are carefully crafted to provide you with comfortable accommodation, exciting sightseeing, and memorable experiences at an affordable price. Whether you’re exploring the beaches of Kovalam, taking a houseboat ride in Alleppey, or enjoying a cultural tour of Fort Kochi, our budget-friendly packages ensure that you can experience Kerala’s beauty within your budget.

Kerala Budget Packages

For travelers who want to explore Kerala without overspending, our Kerala budget packages offer the perfect solution. These packages are designed to provide great value for money while ensuring that you experience the essence of Kerala. From affordable stays to discounted sightseeing tours, Wegomap’s budget packages allow you to explore Kerala’s scenic beauty, rich heritage, and vibrant culture without exceeding your budget.

Kerala Luxury Packages

For those looking to indulge in a more luxurious experience, our Kerala luxury packages offer premium services, exclusive accommodations, and personalized experiences. Stay in luxurious resorts with panoramic views, enjoy private houseboat cruises, and unwind at Kerala’s finest wellness centers. Our luxury packages are designed for travelers who want to experience the best of Kerala in style and comfort, with a focus on relaxation and indulgence.

Our Happy Clients

Suri Tiruvayipati

★★★★★

Hi, This is Surya, from Visakhapatnam, AP,.... in Pongal Holidays we went kerala Trip Through Wegomap Tours and Traves... Our Travel Agent Fathima Madam Given best plan with budget Friendly Package for 4 days and 3 night Package.... She Fallow us every day and given perfect planning for Visit of Sight seens and Alloted best hotels... Especially The House boat Facilities is Good.... Thanks to Wegomap and Fathima Garu..

★★★★★

Tour was very fantastic and wego tour advisor was easily approachable whenever required. Daily feedback calls were given by Mr Jithin from wegomap and the car vehicle arranged was also superb and Cab driver Mr Jahfar (Bro) was very innocent and humble person with nature and had safe ride.

★★★★★

Whole trip was good and our driver jithin methew was too good and friendly and our advisers miss fatima will very coperative. Best service ever.. we will enjoy too much very memorable trip for us ...

Had a fabulous experience, the itinerary was well planned. The hotels were located at best places. Fathima was amazing the way she explained the package. wegompa tour and events was very well organized our trip, very good hotel,boathouse and trip route map in kerala we enjoy very well thanks to team and special thanks to fathim, she supporting well and continuously follow up with our group in trip..

That was an awesome trip to Kerala with WEGOMAP fathima really helped us a lot in every aspectâ¦.and the driver Ajmal was too friendly and made our journey with comfort and safetyâ¦.one thing I can assure about wegomap is safety is there first priorityâ¦.thank you wegomapâ¦.The journey not over yet â¦..The journey just started with you

Sumit Kumar Sinha

★★★★★

Wegomaps provided an outstanding Kerala experience, surpassing expectations. From well-curated itineraries showcasing diverse landscapes to impeccable accommodations, every detail was meticulously planned. Cultural experiences in Munnar and Kumarkom houseboat was great. Knowledgeable and friendly driver Mr Prajeesh added delight to the journey, and seamless logistics ensured a worry-free trip. He exactly knew just when and where to stop and where not to. For an extraordinary and hassle-free Kerala adventure, I highly recommend Wegomap.

Imran Shariff

★★★★★

Exploring munnar without wegomap was impossible... It was great experience to share everything was awesome service provided by them and specially tempo traveler driver binu bhai was very honest and humble in whole trip and made it true ... I recommend to everyone..
